acceptance_criteria.description: List endpoint returns only published pages via shared predicate — drafts never appear
Payload contains only index fields (slug, title, updatedAt — no body)
/pages renders published list; bare /pages navigation resolves; empty state renders cleanly

test_sufficiency: Sufficient — all 5 ACs covered by operator-pinned predicate/ordering tests and source-contract tests; no gaps identified.
documentation_accuracy: Accurate — pages.md and web-shell.md changes match implementation; navigation.md requires no update.

findings.summary: Client component pattern chosen; consistent with project convention (blog index uses same pattern).
